name: NMN middle-aged and elderly registry
summary: Recruiting no-results registry testing nicotinamide mononucleotide in middle-aged and elderly people.
population: Middle-aged and elderly people in an NMN aging trial

trial_details.expected_results_window: Estimated primary completion was May 24, 2026 and study completion is Dec. 31, 2026; no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is a large NMN aging trial-watch record.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
